response.justification: Bogdan's resume shows extensive experience in software development, particularly in web, mobile, and backend systems, but lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or AI accelerator optimization required for this Principal Performance Architect role. His background in high-performance computing (DLang, low-latency systems) and AI-agent infrastructure is promising but not aligned with the core hardware/performance architecture needs of this position.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with deep expertise in low-latency systems and performance optimization (DLang, asynchronous I/O).
Experience with system architecture design and hardware-software interactions (e.g., robotic arms, mobile device orchestration).
Proven track record in contributing to high-impact infrastructure projects (Stripe, Shopify, National Instruments).
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling or AI accelerator hardware/software co-design.
Lacks PhD or equivalent advanced degree in a relevant field (only a BS in Computer Science and a non-STEM Bachelor's).
No clear evidence of performance analysis for deep-learning workloads or GPU architecture expertise.
